== Notes for [[Item:Q91329|Q91329]] ==

ID: I82286

Name: Antiochis of Syria

Prefix: Princess

Given Name: Antiochis

Surname: of Syria

Sex: F

_UID: C8A549057E78494AA6E0AD66C9FFD229A038

Change Date: 26 Nov 2005

Death: Y

Father: ANTIOCHUS @@ III OF SYRIA b: 247 BC

Mother: Laodice III of Pontus

Marriage 1 Ariarathes IV Eusebes of Cappadocia

Married:

Children

Stratonice of Cappadocia

Marriage 2 Xerxes I of Armenia

Married:

Children

Ptolemy I of Commagene

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I82286
--------------------
Antiochis' father was Antiochus of Syria III and her mother was Laodice of Pontus III. Her paternal grandparents were Seleucus of Syria II and Laodice of Syria II. She had a sister named Cleopatra I.

SOURCE NOTES:
http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per01485.htm#0

RESEARCH NOTES:
Princess of Syria; Queen of Armenia & of Cappadocia

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
